---
title: "PABST (and BAM!)"
listing:
  - id: meetings
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "title desc"
    fields: [title, description]
    image-placeholder: assets/photos/placeholder.svg
---

**PaBST** — *Philosophy and Biology Shop Talks* — and its sibling **BaM!**
(*Biology and Models*) Camp are an annual gathering of researchers working at the
seams of biology and philosophy. Each year brings a week of talks, arguments, and
long walks — held at the same retreat, the Lodge, every year.

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Meetings

Browse a year below for its talks, people, and photos.

:::{#meetings}
:::
